title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NAREDCO - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NAREDCO - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NAREDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NAREDCO:
NAREDCO is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NAREDCO!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
